items.rationale: No agent registry or named owner is visible in the code.
The skill scripts read environment variables and run privileged shell steps — patterns worth checking against untrusted input before you connect them.
These are installable skill packages; some run subprocesses. Whether they were reviewed and version-pinned before connecting is an operator step the code can't show.
The skill requirements pin known-vulnerable dependencies (for example mcp and pillow) with open advisories.
No human-approval step is visible for high-consequence actions.
Whether a tested kill-switch exists can't be seen from the code.
No incident runbook is visible in the repo.
